name: st. john's wort
interaction_note: Strong CYP3A4 and P-gp inducer. Reduces plasma levels of many co-administered drugs.

name: ginkgo biloba
interaction_note: Inhibits platelet-activating factor. Increases bleeding risk with anticoagulants and NSAIDs.

name: garlic
interaction_note: Inhibits CYP2C9 and has antiplatelet properties. Increases warfarin effect.

name: ginseng
interaction_note: Has intrinsic hypoglycemic activity. May cause hypoglycemia when combined with diabetes medications.

name: fish oil
interaction_note: High-dose omega-3 inhibits platelet aggregation. Increases bleeding risk with anticoagulants.

name: echinacea
interaction_note: May inhibit CYP3A4 and stimulate immune function — counteracts immunosuppressants.

name: saw palmetto
interaction_note: 5-alpha reductase inhibition may have additive effect with finasteride and hormone therapies.

name: ginger
interaction_note: Inhibits platelet aggregation and thromboxane synthesis. Increases bleeding risk.

name: green tea
interaction_note: EGCG inhibits CYP2C9 and high vitamin K content can antagonize warfarin's anticoagulant effect.

name: turmeric
interaction_note: Inhibits multiple CYP enzymes and has antiplatelet properties. Increases levels of many co-administered drugs.
